intent: First contact with Carmilla in the witch cottage — the coven's ward-mending hook (fidelity transcription of the original rig).

intro.text: The candles flicker as Carmilla turns toward you.

response.text: Hey Carmilla, the coven said you needed help with the wards.

carmilla_reply.text: The wards are fraying. If you lend me your focus, we can mend them together.

carmilla_reply_alt.text: This cottage shelters secrets, little spark. Mind the sigils on the floorboards.
